note: clarify_round.go Prepare: replaced the empty-command branch (returning zero DryRunCommand) with agents.BuildACPWouldRun(prep.Clarifier.Name, prep.ModelSpec, true), matching the pattern already used in review.go:996.
contract_draft.go Prepare: same fix as f_001 — replaced empty-command guard with agents.BuildACPWouldRun(prep.Drafter.Name, prep.ModelSpec, true).
execute.go formatAgentCommand: prepend command.Env entries before the command so ACP adapter env vars (e.g. ANTHROPIC_MODEL=...) appear in human would_run output.
Same change as f_001 — clarify_round.go now calls BuildACPWouldRun so ACP executor attempts also record the adapter command/env instead of a zero DryRunCommand.
Same change as f_002 — contract_draft.go now calls BuildACPWouldRun for both reviewer and executor ACP agents.
execute.go BuildRequest: added Env: append([]string{}, context.Prepared.WouldRun.Env...) to the manual DryRunCommand copy so the request JSON includes ACP adapter env entries.
Same change as f_003 — formatAgentCommand now includes Env entries, so both execute plan and execute run human output show the full ACP launch details.
clarify_round_test.go:113: replaced stale WouldRun.Stdin assertion with ACP adapter checks (Command == "npx", Stdin == "").
contract_draft_test.go:108: same fix as f_008 — updated WouldRun assertion to verify ACP adapter command instead of CLI-style Stdin path.

SECURITY.md: removed the CLI transport paragraph (PACTUM_AGENT_TRANSPORT=cli, codex exec / claude -p commands) and updated the Plan-before-running bullet to drop the stale CLI-transport invocation claim.

docs/install.md: renamed 'Optional: agent CLIs' to 'Optional: ACP adapter packages', replaced codex/claude CLI references with the npm adapter packages and PACTUM_*_ACP_COMMAND override notes, and updated the doctor and CI paragraphs to reference the adapter launcher (npx) instead of agent CLIs.
